mapper.select: SELECT id, plan_id, phase_name, task_title, description, recommended_days, completed, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM plan_tasks WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan_tasks ( plan_id, phase_name, task_title, description, recommended_days, completed, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{phaseName}, #{taskTitle}, #{description}, #{recommendedDays}, #{completed}, #{sortOrder} )
mapper.update: UPDATE plan_tasks SET phase_name = #{phaseName}, task_title = #{taskTitle}, description = #{description}, recommended_days = #{recommendedDays}, completed = #{completed}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
